_comment: Hand-editable. Total-OpenRouter-system growth anchors. Token points with plot=true feed the growth chart (merged with our computed monthly run-rate from history.jsonl); the Mar point is chart-excluded (plot=false) because it is a different/earlier basis (2.5M users, and $83M/8.4T implies an absurd $9.9/Mtok — not same-basis as later points). Spend points power the 'tokens exploding, spend flat -> price collapsing' insight.

token_points.flag: basis break — press figure at ~2.5M users; methodology differs from later points

token_points.src: computed from rankings feed (~3.2 quadrillion tokens/yr)

_scale_note: token chart renders on LOG scale so the Mar->May basis break reads as flagged discontinuity, not fake ramp
